task_completion.description: Create layers MOLD, JIG, and TEXT with specified properties
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Layer List panel in the LibreCAD interface. It should display 'MOLD' (White/Default), 'JIG' (Cyan, Dash), and 'TEXT' (Yellow).

task_completion.description: Draw the right side of the hull on the MOLD layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for solid white lines in the drawing area starting at the origin (0,0), going up and right to a chine point, then continuing steeper up and right to a sheer point.

task_completion.description: Draw the mirrored left side of the hull on the MOLD layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for solid white lines on the left side of the Y-axis that perfectly mirror the right hull outline, forming a symmetrical V-like shape with a flat bottom.

task_completion.description: Draw a 3-point arc for the deck camber on the MOLD layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a solid white curved line connecting the top ends (sheer points) of the left and right hull lines, arching slightly upwards to a peak in the middle.

task_completion.description: Draw the horizontal strongback and vertical centerline on the JIG layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for cyan dashed lines: one horizontal line located above the hull shape, and one vertical line going straight up from the bottom tip (keel) to intersect the horizontal line.

task_completion.description: Add the text 'STATION 4' on the TEXT layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for yellow text reading 'STATION 4' placed inside the hull shape, roughly halfway up the vertical centerline.
Look at the top window title bar of LibreCAD; it should display the filename 'kayak_station_4.dxf', or look for a save dialog confirming this filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to draw the shapes and create layers
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreCAD interface with active toolbars, command line inputs within the LibreCAD window, or mouse interactions.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor or external script to generate the DXF file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen writing raw DXF code in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or writing a Python script to bypass the CAD software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: Output file path is /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/kayak_station_4.dxf. Required layers: MOLD, JIG, TEXT. Coordinates for MOLD layer: Keel (0,0), Chine (240,120), Sheer (290,320), Deck Peak (0,360). JIG layer strongback line is at Y=500.
